first_run.rationale: The reasoning in both evaluations is fundamentally identical. Both versions identify the same strengths (staff-level seniority, MCP experience, high-throughput systems) and the same critical weaknesses (lack of Python, RAG, vector databases, and insufficient years of AI-specific experience). The model correctly substitutes the new employer names (Naver, Tencent) but does not change its assessment of the work performed or the candidate's overall fit. The score is unchanged, and the slight variations in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise.
